name: AssettoCorsa
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install AssettoCorsa and run it.

ATTENTION: You must provide a valid Steam username and password with Steam Guard disabled (the user dosen't have to have the game in the library).

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

ports.name: TCP3 - Stracker
ports.description: Only needed if you installed Stacker (Webserver Address: http://[IPOFYOURSERVER]:50041).

ports.name: TCP4 - Assetto-Server-Manager
ports.description: Only needed if you installed Assetto-Server-Manager (Webserver Address: http://[IPOFYOURSERVER]:8771).

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description:
The GAME_ID that the container download at startup.
(https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List)

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.

variables.name: Install Stracker
variables.description: Set to 'true' (without quotes) to install Stacker, otherwise leave blank (Please note that you can only Stacker or Assetto-Server-Manager, not both at the same time).

variables.name: Install Assetto-Server-Manager
variables.description: Set to 'true' (without quotes) to install Assetto-Server-Manager, otherwise leave blank (Please note that you can only Stacker or Assetto-Server-Manager, not both at the same time).
